content: I hope you received enough feedback from the community to improve your contribution. Once you have made the necessary updates, publish your contribution!

I think the description of the output is not quite right yet. 
Are the numbers 00, 01, 10, 11 on top of the 16 lines?
Also, I think I figured out what they mean, but it's not obvious at first with the current description.
Keep up the good work.
The Lone Rider test and the Lone Rider validator are the same. Will either of them be changed so that they are different?
Yeah, I will change the validator.
Done, added one more test and validator for a good measure.

Quick review first:

Goal
* Please format "P", "R" and "C" as {{constants}} instead of [[variables]].

* Consider formatting other constants (e.g. 3, 180) as well.

Input
* Please format "P", "R" and "C" as {{constants}} and remove the quotation marks.

* Please format "_", "0" and "1" as {{constants}} instead of [[variables]].

* Please format the "1" in the last paragraph as a {{constant}}.

Output
* Please format "16 lines" in <<bold>>.

* Please format "_", "00", "01", "10" and "11" as {{constants}} instead of [[variables]].

Cases
* Please make sure each test and its corresponding validator covers the same scenario with similar inputs. Some pairs don't seem aligned currently.

Cover picture
* Consider uploading a cover picture for the puzzle.

I'll perform a more detailed review after the points above have been addressed.

Thanks.
